title: Never Share OTP
text: No bank, wallet or government agency will ever ask for your OTP, PIN, or CVV. Sharing it is the same as handing over cash.

title: Don't Click Unknown Links
text: Avoid clicking SMS/WhatsApp links from unknown senders. Type the bank URL manually in your browser instead.

title: Avoid Remote Access Apps
text: Never install AnyDesk, TeamViewer or QuickSupport for 'customer care'. Fraudsters use them to drain your account.

title: Verify Customer Care Numbers
text: Always pick support numbers from the official bank/app website, never from a Google search result.

title: QR Codes Only Send, Never Receive
text: You only scan QR codes to PAY money. Anyone asking you to scan to 'receive' is scamming you.

title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
text: Turn on 2FA on email, WhatsApp, social media and net banking. It blocks most account-takeover attempts.

title: Inspect URLs Carefully
text: Look for spelling tricks like 'icic1.com' or 'paytm-help.in'. Real bank domains never use bit.ly or tinyurl.

title: Hang Up on Threats
text: Real police, CBI or customs never call asking for money. Disconnect and call 1930 to report it.

title: Set UPI Limits
text: Reduce your daily UPI transaction limit in your app. It caps damage if your account is compromised.

title: Educate Family
text: Talk to elderly parents and children about common scams. Awareness is the strongest firewall.
